subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] locking: Add contended_release tracepoint to sleepable locks

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's approach to handling contention on rwsem and semaphore locks. Suggested re-evaluating the tracepoint firing order for these cases.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch adds a new tracepoint, contended_release, to track lock hold time under contention. It fires on the holder side when a contended lock is released, complementing existing waiter-side tracepoints. The patch modifies slowpath unlock paths for various sleepable locks, including mutex, rtmutex, semaphore, rwsem, and percpu-rwsem.
